summary_en: 1,000,000 shares (1.4% of shares outstanding) to be acquired via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. Acquisition limit: ¥700M. Execution period: 18 May 2026 to 30 June 2026. Rationale: enhance shareholder returns and capital efficiency.
title_en: Notice regarding determination of matters relating to acquisition of treasury shares (acquisition of treasury shares based on articles of incorporation pursuant to article 165, paragraph 2 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: On 15 May 2026, Yamashin-Filter's board of directors authorized the acquisition of up to 1,000,000 ordinary shares (1.4% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for up to ¥700M. The shares will be purchased on the Tokyo Stock Exchange via open-market buying between 18 May 2026 and 30 June 2026. The company stated the purpose is to enhance shareholder returns and improve capital efficiency while enabling flexible capital policy in response to changing business conditions. As of 31 March 2026, the company held 320,458 treasury shares against 69,618,020 shares issued and outstanding (excluding treasury stock).
